deals.summary: Two interested buyers walking the property — most likely Wednesday.
deals.next_action: Confirm walkthrough time. Line up a backup buyer in case primary walks away.

deals.summary: Two buyers in play. Cyrus offered $12,500. Quel Thompson offered $14,500. Need to follow up on both offers and lock the higher one.
deals.next_action: Follow up with both buyers this week. Confirm Quel's $14,500 stays firm; close out Cyrus or upsell.

deals.summary: Offer received at $17K. Buyer wants $20K. $3K gap to close.
deals.next_action: Negotiate the $3K spread. Either move buyer up to $19K or push owner down to $18K.

deals.summary: Owner wants $30K. Got an offer at $20K. No other interest.
deals.next_action: Either push the buyer up or have a hard conversation with owner about market reality. If both refuse, archive.

deals.summary: 2BR / 1.5BA, asking $45K. Need photos before we can market or get buyers walking.
deals.next_action: Get pictures from the seller this week.

deals.summary: Asking $220K. Owner already fixed it up — they're flipping. Most likely no fit for our wholesale model.
deals.next_action: Confirm with owner there's no flexibility, then deprioritize or archive.
